channel.title: Attention-Sinks on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Attention-Sinks on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: LLM Engineering (6): Long Context — RoPE, YaRN, Sinks
item.description: “1M token context” is one of the most over-claimed numbers in LLMs. A model can attend to 1M tokens — that’s an architecture statement. A model can use information at position 800K to answer a question — that’s a behavior statement, and it’s more challenging. This chapter covers the math of position encoding, the engineering tricks that extend context beyond the training length, and why most long-context claims fail needle-in-a-haystack tests.
